WellID: # Each row is one COMPLETED well from a previous campaign.
# The engine resamples FracDaysPerStage and MillingDaysPerPlug as bootstrap
# distributions -- the more historical wells you supply
# MINIMUM REQUIREMENT: at least 5 wells with positive FracDaysPerStage and
# MillingDaysPerPlug values. The engine will reject the file if all values
# in either column are zero or missing.
# StagesPlanned     : number of frac stages originally planned
# StagesCompleted   : number of frac stages actually pumped
# PlugsInstalled    : number of isolation plugs set (usually = StagesCompleted - 1)
# ContingencyPlugs  : extra plugs required due to failures / premature sets
# FracDays          : total pumping days for this well
# SCMTDays          : CT/wireline time for cement evaluation (0 if run offline)
# MillingDays       : total milling days for this well
# FracDaysPerStage  : FracDays / StagesCompleted (key distribution for sampling)
# MillingDaysPerPlug: MillingDays / PlugsInstalled (key distribution for sampling)
# FracDaysPerStage: include only stages that were pumped to design.
#   Exclude screen-outs if they artificially inflate the value and are
#   already captured separately as a risk event.
# MillingDaysPerPlug: use actual milling time per plug drilled out.
# The validation step will warn if:
#   - StagesCompleted != StagesPlanned (flag for review -- was this a curtailed well?)
# EXAMPLE DATA (replace with your actual historical campaign data)
